title: Completely Optimized
description: A completely optimized modpack for max FPS!
body:
Completely Optimized: The Ultimate FPS Boost Modpack

Completely Optimized is crafted for players who want the smoothest Minecraft experience possible. Designed with performance in mind, this modpack delivers a significant FPS boost, ensuring that you can enjoy Minecraft without any lag.

What does Completely Optimized add?

FPS Boost: Experience a massive increase in frames per second, making your gameplay smoother than ever.

Enhanced Visual Options: Fullbright, possibility to remove water and lava fog and pumpkin blur for a clearer view.

Sprint Display: Easily keep track of your sprint status with the built-in sprint display.

Key Features

Sodium: At the core of our modpack, Sodium offers unparalleled optimization, making Minecraft run faster and look better.

Wide Compatibility: Compatible with Minecraft 1.21, the latest version, ensuring you can enjoy all the newest features without compromising performance.

Why Download Completely Optimized?

Unmatched Performance: Simply put, it's the best optimization modpack for achieving high FPS.

Designed for All Systems: Whether you have a high-end gaming rig or a basic setup, Completely Optimized will work seamlessly.

Critical Information

Community Support: Join our active Discord server for support, feedback, and to connect with other players.

Easy Installation: If you can run vanilla Minecraft, you can run Completely Optimized without any issues.

Extra FPS: Enjoy a noticeable improvement in FPS compared to normal Minecraft, giving you a more enjoyable and fluid gaming experience.

Completely Optimized is your go-to modpack for a high-performance Minecraft experience. Say goodbye to lag and hello to smooth, uninterrupted gameplay. Download now and see the difference!
